_publications._publicationTitle: A haploinsufficiency restoration strategy corrects neurobehavioral deficits in Nf1+/- mice.

_contextSnippet: we validated these siRNA sequences from the library in a human mast cell line (LUVA), which is amenable to transfection and screening
details: Used to validate siRNA sequences from library screen, showing neurofibromin accumulation with FBXW11 and FBXO3 targeting
